name: RuleTester exits zero when every case for every rule under test passes -- the H-11 CI gate green path
command:
mkdir -p tests/r/valid && printf 'ok
' > tests/r/valid/c.ts && printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash
exit 0
' > stub.sh && chmod +x stub.sh && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/test-rule.sh" r --tests-dir tests --detector stub.sh 2>out.txt && grep -q 'total pass=1 fail=0' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
